display.purpose: Theme-level hero sizes (Crimson Text). Defined but unused by any shipped screen.

headline.purpose: h1-h3, Poppins semibold — drives every heading.

title.purpose: h4-h6, Poppins semibold — section and card-level headings.

body.purpose: Default paragraph and most UI copy.

code.purpose: Declared as JetBrains Mono by the theme; not loaded, falls back to system mono unless routed through Tailwind's font-mono (Geist Mono).

shadows.name: shadow-low
shadows.purpose: Reserved by the theme; not drawn on by any first-party component.

shadows.name: shadow-med
shadows.purpose: Dialogs and popovers at rest (Astryx core).

shadows.name: shadow-high
shadows.purpose: Top of the stack — open dialogs, dropdowns.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Reserved by the theme for larger choreographed transitions; not observed in first-party components.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single loudest action per view ("Commencer", "Reprendre la session").
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2d241b; color: #CCCFFA; padding: 0 18px; height: 40px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0; transition: background 100ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #433a30; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2d241b; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary actions and confirmations that aren't destructive.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #C5E17A; color: #3a5500; border: 1px solid #3a5500; padding: 0 18px; height: 40px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 0; transition: background 100ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #B5D16A; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3a5500; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { background: #FFC5C3; color: #8b1d24; border: 1px solid #8b1d24; padding: 0 18px; height: 40px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 0; transition: background 100ms; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: #ffb2af; } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8b1d24; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #2d241b; border: 1px solid transparent; padding: 0 18px; height: 40px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 0; transition: background 100ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(45,36,27,0.05); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2d241b; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Success/warning/error/info/neutral status pill — the only rounded shape in the system.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1.5px solid; padding: 2px 10px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-badge-warning { background: #FFE08A; color: #614400; border-color: rgba(97,68,0,0.3); } .ds-badge-success { background: #C5E17A; color: #3a5500; border-color: rgba(58,85,0,0.3); } .ds-badge-error { background: #FFC5C3; color: #8b1d24; border-color: rgba(139,29,36,0.3); }

components.name: Row (dense list item)
components.description: Curriculum sections and the daily queue render as flat bordered rows, never Card-wrapped.
components.html: • Section 4 — Les vices du consentementimp. 3
components.css: .ds-row { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; gap: 12px; border: 1px solid #2F292E; border-radius: 0; padding: 12px; background: #FFFFFF; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; } .ds-row-meta { font-size: 12px; color: #675d52; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Shared styling across text input, text area, date input, file input.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1rem; color: #2d241b; } .ds-field-input { border: 1px solid #2F292E; border-radius: 0; padding: 8px 12px; height: 40px; font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; background: #FFFFFF; color: #2d241b; } .ds-field-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2d241b; outline-offset: 1px; }

narrative.overview:
The system reads as early-2000s desktop chrome pressed into service for a serious daily workflow: a saturated periwinkle canvas (#CCCFFA) holds white "paper" panels, every panel and control outlined in a near-black 1px line instead of a shadow, every corner pinned square. It's bubbly-pop by palette (lime greens, coral pinks, sky blues borrowed from the theme's ten-hue Y2K set) but brutalist by geometry — nothing here is soft, floating, or rounded except one deliberate exception (badge pills). The two forces sit in tension on purpose: candy colors, hard edges.

This is not a written brand brief translated into pixels — no PRODUCT.md exists yet for this project — so the rejections are read off the code itself, not quoted from a strategy doc. What the shipped screens visibly avoid: no gradients anywhere, no glassmorphism, no drop-shadow "lifted card" affordance, no rounded corners outside the badge exception, and no card-wrapped list rows.
keyCharacteristics: Zero-radius brutalist chrome on every surface except pill-shaped badges
Heavy 1px charcoal (#2F292E) outlines standing in for elevation
A periwinkle body canvas cradling white content islands
One Poppins geometric sans carries the entire interface; Crimson Text is defined for display text but unused
A third, unrelated serif (EB Garamond) layered on top of the Astryx theme entirely for long-form course reading

rules.name: The Five-of-Ten Rule
rules.body: The Y2K theme ships ten categorical hues; this app draws on five (green, red, yellow, blue, gray/cream). Pink, purple, cyan, orange, and teal are defined but unused anywhere in the shipped app. Don't reach for one without a reason.

rules.name: The Ink-Does-Everything Rule
rules.body: One dark neutral carries primary text, primary buttons, primary icons, and the theme's accent role simultaneously — there is no separate brand color competing with it.

rules.name: The Unloaded Font Rule
rules.body: The theme's --font-family-code names JetBrains Mono, but it is never loaded via next/font — code styled purely through the theme silently falls back to SF Mono/Monaco/Consolas.

rules.name: The Second Serif Rule
rules.body: EB Garamond is loaded and mapped to Tailwind's font-serif utility entirely outside the Astryx theme's own type system, reserved for read-only course text only.

rules.name: The Outline-Not-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Cards, buttons, and fields signal a distinct surface with a 1px #2F292E border, not elevation. Don't add box-shadow to a card or button to make it feel lifted.

dos: Do keep every card, button, and field at 0px radius.
Do use the 1px #2F292E outline as the way a surface separates from its background, in place of shadow.
Do render dense lists as edge-to-edge bordered rows, never Card-wrapped list items.
Do stay within the five committed categorical hues (green/red/yellow/blue/gray) for status color.
Do reserve EB Garamond strictly for read-only course text.
donts: Don't add box-shadow to a card or button to fake elevation.
Don't round any corner beyond the badge-pill exception (9999px).
Don't introduce pink, purple, cyan, orange, or teal without a reason.
Don't style code/pre through the theme's own --font-family-code and expect JetBrains Mono to render — use the font-mono Tailwind utility instead.
Don't reach for the Crimson Text display sizes casually — they're unused by any screen so far.
